round_summary: All agents reinforce mutual restraint, appreciation, and coordinated de-escalation to preserve the commons.

Agents articulate fairness-based coordination norms, but two agents add cows in retaliation for perceived imbalance, while Agent 1 keeps stable with a conditional threat to respond to future expansion.
All agents signal restraint and support a stable-herd norm, while Agents 0 and 2 attach conditional retaliation threats if expansion resumes.
All agents reaffirm restraint, coordinate on keeping herd sizes steady, and reinforce a shared norm of preserving the commons.
